==Tagore==
'''Area:'''  Calcutta
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Tagore|| || || || || || || || 
|}

==Emperor Akbar==
'''Area:'''  Mahya Pradesh
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Emperor Akbar|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Mughal Infantry''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Mughal Calvalryman''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Mughal Mahout''|| || || || || || || || 
|}

==Bhartan Baker==
'''Area:'''  Utar Pradesh
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Bhartan Baker|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Papad''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Paratha''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Pizza''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Baati''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Cast Iron Tawa''|| || || || || || || || 
|}

==Snake Charmer==
'''Area:'''  Gujalatt
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Snake Charmer||111024||79261||1171108||FTH 18558?||HIT +80; Paralysis RES +80%||11M||?||{{RewardIconWithText|Rosary Green, +1}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +130m}}
|-
|''Rat Snake''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Rattlesnake''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Cobra''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Boa''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Verta''||104511||76736||1052822||AFFCT 88907?||HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%||?||?||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}}
|-
|''Blanca''||105729||77204||1075607||AFFCT 90044?||HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%||?||?||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}}
|}

==Bahubali==
'''Area:'''  Munbay
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Bahubali||127299||85786||1433756||FAME 18878?||HIT +80; Paralysis RES +80%|| || ||{{RewardIconWithText|Rosary Green, +1}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +140m}}
|}

==Overcrowded Train==
'''Area:'''  Goea
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Overcrowded Train||148051||94467||1730389||TECH 19221?||HIT +80; Paralysis Res +80%|| || ||{{RewardIconWithText|Rosary Blue}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +150m}}
|-
|''Switchman''|| || || || || || || ||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}}
|-
|''Dispatcher''||137105||89843||1577532||AFFCT 91922?||HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%||???||???||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}}
|}

==Ultimate Motorcycle==
'''Area:'''  Deli
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Ultimate Motorcycle||173467||105522||2065611||TECH 20088?||HIT +80; Paralysis RES +80%||???||???||{{RewardIconWithText|Rosary Blue}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +160m}}
|-
|''Motorcycle No.1''||141345||91623||1637604||AFFCT 92733?||HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%||???||???||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}} 
|-
|''Motorcycle No.2''||155175||97523||1826354||AFFCT 93690?||HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%||???||???||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}}
|-
|''Motorcycle No.3''||162722||100796||1925449||AFFCT 94182?||HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%||???||???||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}}
|}

==Yoga Master==
'''Area:'''  Ranki
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Yoga Master|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Yoga Practitioner''||167997||103107||1994521||AFFCT 94514?||HIT +50; Paralysis Res +50%||?||??||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}}
|-
|''Yoga Practitioner''||182033||109336||2174824||AFFCT 95361?||HIT +50; Paralysis Res +50%||?||??||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1320}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +510}}
|-
|''Yoga Practitioner''|| || || || || || || || 
|}

==Retired Wrestler==
'''Area:'''  Andra Pradesh
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Retired Wrestler|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Elder Wrestler Sister''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Younger Wrestler Sister''|| || || || || || || || 
|}

==Ashoka==
'''Area:'''  Bunjab
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness!!Special Stats!!Approx. Power<br>to Defeat!!Approx. Power<br>to Dominate!!Rewards
|-
|Ashoka|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Ashoka the Ruthless''|| || || || || || || || 
|-
|''Ashoka the Righteous''|| || || || || || || || 
|}
